notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC + query generation.
First POC passed verifier-v1 strictly on first try (no regen).
compile_iters=1 = single compile+run round; no repair triggered.

Pattern: delay-gfp / DSAC busy-wait-in-sleepable-context. Detector heuristic: function calls a busy-wait primitive (mdelay/udelay/ndelay) AND a sleep-capable primitive (kzalloc/kmalloc/mutex_lock/msleep/...), so the context is provably non-atomic.

Verifier-v1 was driven on a separate poc-for-verifier.c (the _buggy slice alone) so whole-file counts match the single-function seed slice; the frozen POC.c contains both _buggy and _fixed for the mini-DB oracle (matches lin-1-rep1 convention).
